title: Contract Project Manager – Mechanical Systems
description_raw:
Spencer Ogden is looking for a Contract Project Manager with a mechanical systems background to support a major industrial client through the execution phase of a process plant upgrade in Greater Manchester.

The project involves the design, fabrication and installation of high-pressure pipework, pressure vessels, heat exchangers and associated ancillary mechanical equipment. The client operates under PSSR 2000 (Pressure Systems Safety Regulations) and PED (Pressure Equipment Directive) requirements.

Scope of the role:
- Develop and maintain the programme schedule (P6) and monthly cost report
- Chair weekly progress meetings with contractors and client engineering teams
- Manage design freeze milestones and formal design reviews (PDR / CDR)
- Oversee completion of HAZOP actions and PSRR (Pre-Start-up Safety Review)
- Coordinate with the client’s CDM Principal Designer and Principal Contractor on HSE compliance

Desired profile:
- Degree in mechanical engineering (BEng minimum)
- 6–10 years’ project management in process, oil & gas, or chemical sector
- APM PMQ or PRINCE2 Practitioner
- Competent with Primavera P6; MS Project also acceptable
- Working knowledge of PSSR 2000, PED, and LOLER where relevant

Rate: £520–£580 per day (IR35 status TBC — subject to client CEST assessment)
Duration: 6 months from start
Start: subject to availability; earliest 28 July 2026
Location: Manchester (office + site-based split; no remote working)
